briefdescription.para: This function sets up the read channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the context pointer to the VDMA engine.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the setup is successful, XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the write channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the context pointer to the VDMA engine..

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the setup is successful, XST_FAILURE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function starts the DMA transfers.

detaileddescription.para: Since the DMA engine is operating in circular buffer mode, video frames will be transferred continuously.

parameterdescription.para: points to the DMA engine instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if both read and write start successfully
XST_FAILURE if one or both directions cannot be started

briefdescription.para: This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.
This function programs MIPI CSI SS with the required timing parameters.

listitem.para:
This function enables MIPI CSI IP
None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function programs MIPI DSI SS with the required timing parameters.

listitem.para:
This function disables MIPI CSI IP
None.
None.

This function disables MIPI DSI SS.
None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function programs colour space converter with the given width and height.

parameterdescription.para: is Hsize of a packet in pixels.
is number of lines of a packet.

listitem.para:
* This function resets and releases IPs
*
*
None.
*
*
None.
*

briefdescription.para: This function writes, reads, and verifies the data to the IIC EEPROM.

detaileddescription.para: It does the write as a single page write, performs a buffered read.

briefdescription.para: This Send handler is called asynchronously from an interrupt context and indicates that data in the specified buffer has been sent.

parameterdescription.para: is not used, but contains a pointer to the IIC device driver instance which the handler is being called for.

briefdescription.para: This Receive handler is called asynchronously from an interrupt context and indicates that data in the specified buffer has been Received.

parameterdescription.para: is not used, but contains a pointer to the IIC device driver instance which the handler is being called for.

briefdescription.para: This Status handler is called asynchronously from an interrupt context and indicates the events that have occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the IIC driver instance for which the handler is being called for.
indicates the condition that has occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function writes a buffer of data to the Adapter IIC.

parameterdescription.para: contains the number of bytes in the buffer to be written.

simplesect.para: The Byte count should not exceed the page size of the EEPROM as noted by the constant PAGE_SIZE.

memberdef.argsstring: (XAxiVdma *InstancePtr, int DeviceId, int hsize, int vsize, int buf_base_addr, int number_frame_count, int enable_frm_cnt_intr)
memberdef.name: RunVDMA

detaileddescription.para: This API is the interface between application and other API. When application will call this API with right argument, This API will call rest of the API to configure the read and write path of VDMA,based on ID. After that it will start both the read and write path of VDMA

parameterdescription.para: is the handle to XAxiVdma data structure.
is the device ID of current VDMA
is the horizontal size of the frame. It will be in Pixels. The actual size of frame will be calculated by multiplying this with tdata width.
is the Vertical size of the frame.
is the buffer address where frames will be written and read by VDMA.
specifies after how many frames the interrupt should come.
is for enabling frame count interrupt when set to 1.

briefdescription.para: This function wait until the DMA channel halts.

parameterdescription.para: specifies VdmaChannel is MM2S or S2MM .

simplesect.para: MM2S_HALT_SUCCESS, S2MM_HALT_SUCCESS in success MM2S_HALT_FAILURE, S2MM_HALT_FAILURE on failure

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
X.XX XX YY/MM/DD 1.00 RHe 19/09/20 Initial release.
